questions.question: Define data privacy and explain its significance in the context of data security. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a concise definition and a brief explanation of its importance

questions.question: What are the key elements of data protection by design and default? (5 marks)
questions.hint: List the key elements of data protection by design and default

questions.question: An organization is required to notify the relevant authorities in case of a data breach. What is the purpose of such notification? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the purpose of notification in case of a data breach
